title: Fix cp without -r on directory error message
description: cp of a directory without -r flag should return a clear, consistent error message matching UNIX convention. DBB-m11-004 is failing. PRD gap: 'cp without -r on directory returns error — minor correctness gap'. Acceptance: cp /dir /dest returns 'cp: -r not specified; omitting directory /dir' or equivalent UNIX-standard message, with corresponding test.
